message:
refactor(sync): drop redundant & on already-reference temp_path args

Tiny follow-up to 4404948. rename_jsonl_temp_output now takes
temp_path: &Path, so the two `&temp_path` expressions inside its
body were auto-reborrowing a reference. Drop the extra ampersand
and pass `temp_path` directly to require_safe_sync_overwrite_path
and crate::util::durable_rename — both already accept &Path.
Cosmetic cleanup; no behaviour change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
